payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden cabinet panel with glossy finish and visible vertical grain/panel lines; a lighter wooden baseboard or trim is visible at the bottom of the crop; dim lighting and slight surface reflections suggest the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).
